name: Gardevoir TF / Transformation (Pokemon)
description:
(CW: Pokémon transformation, mental change, AI intentionally roleplays as user)
This doesn't make any sense. How could Jirachi **possibly** think this is what you meant when you wished to "understand Pokémon better"?
Sure, Gardevoir can sense emotions and obviously understand what they're saying... but this is still way too far!
It seems you'll have to track them down again if you want to go back.

(Update: Added "Pokemon" to the title to make it slightly easier to find.)
creator: Orbital_Lithium
